Name: APC Back-UPS 500VA
Column1:
The APC Back-UPS 500VA is an ideal power backup solution for safeguarding essential electronics in homes and small office setups. Designed with reliability and efficiency in mind, this uninterruptible power supply provides seamless protection against power outages, surges, and fluctuations, ensuring uninterrupted performance for connected devices such as computers, routers, modems, and gaming consoles. With its 300W power capacity, the Back-UPS 500VA supports multiple devices simultaneously, making it suitable for a variety of scenarios. Its three battery-backed outlets ensure that critical devices remain operational during power interruptions, while the three surge-protected outlets prevent damage to less essential equipment. Additionally, it comes equipped with audible alarms that notify users of changes in power conditions, giving you peace of mind during unexpected disruptions. The integrated PowerChute software enhances its functionality by allowing automated system shutdowns, protecting sensitive data and minimizing hardware risks during extended outages. This APC Back-UPS 500VA also features a compact and lightweight tower design, allowing for easy installation in any space-constrained area. The lead-acid battery is both efficient and quick to recharge, ensuring readiness for the next power event. In terms of eco-friendliness, the APC Back-UPS 500VA adheres to energy efficiency standards and provides an environmentally conscious solution for power protection. Its durable build quality and user-friendly operation make it a trustworthy choice for protecting your valuable equipment and ensuring smooth operation during unpredictable power situations. Specifications
  • Power Capacity: 500VA / 300W.
  • Outlets: 6 total outlets (3 with battery backup and surge protection, 3 with surge protection only).
  • Battery Type: Lead-acid battery with a typical recharge time of 8 hours.
  • Runtime: Provides backup power for a few minutes, depending on the load.
  • Surge Protection: 480 Joules surge energy rating.
  • Input Voltage: 120V.
  • Output Voltage: 120V.
  • Additional Features:
    • Audible alarms for power status.
    • PowerChute software for automatic shutdown.
    • Compact tower design for easy placement.
  • Dimensions: Approximately 18.5 cm (H) x 11.5 cm (W) x 21.3 cm (D).
  • Weight: Around 4.9 kg.
  • Warranty: 2 years.

The Liebert PSI 1000VA (900W) is a high-performance uninterruptible power supply (UPS) designed for critical applications in IT environments, small data centers, and network closets. Here's a detailed overview: The Liebert PSI 1000VA (900W) is a line-interactive UPS that provides reliable power backup and protection against power disturbances such as outages, surges, and voltage fluctuations. With its 0.9 power factor, it delivers more usable power to connected devices, making it ideal for modern IT equipment. The Liebert PSI 1000VA (900W) is designed with flexibility in mind, featuring a rack/tower convertible form factor and a rotatable LCD display for easy monitoring in any setup. This UPS includes automatic voltage regulation (AVR) to stabilize output voltage without using the battery, extending battery life. It also supports hot-swappable batteries, allowing for maintenance without interrupting power to connected devices. Multiple communication options, including USB and SNMP, enable remote monitoring and management. Specifications
  • Capacity: 1000VA / 900W.
  • Power Factor: 0.9.
  • Input Voltage: 230V.
  • Output Voltage: 230V.
  • Waveform Type: Pure sine wave.
  • Transfer Time: 4–6 ms.
  • Outlets: 8–9 battery-backed outlets (depending on the model).
  • Battery Type: Sealed lead-acid, maintenance-free.
  • Runtime: 3–5 minutes at full load.
  • Form Factor: Rack/tower convertible, 2U height.
  • Communication Ports: USB, SNMP, contact closure.
  • Operating Temperature: 0–40°C.
  • Warranty: 2 years.
Categories: Computing Devices, Computing Devices > UPS

Name: FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER
Column1:
The FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER is a cutting-edge energy solution that brings together the functionality of an inverter, solar charge controller, and battery charger in one efficient device. Designed for residential, commercial, and small-scale industrial applications, this hybrid inverter is an all-in-one energy manager, perfect for powering homes, offices, and businesses. Featuring a pure sine wave output, the inverter provides clean and stable power, making it safe for sensitive electronics such as computers, televisions, and medical devices. At its core is a highly efficient MPPT (Maximum Power Point Tracking) solar charge controller, which optimizes energy capture from solar panels, ensuring maximum energy utilization. Its wide MPPT voltage range of 120-450V DC makes it highly adaptable, accommodating various solar panel setups. With a high operational efficiency of up to 95%, the FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER delivers reliable performance while minimizing energy wastage. It includes advanced protection features such as overload, short circuit, over-temperature, and low battery safeguards, ensuring durability and dependability in demanding conditions. The FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER supports a high charging current of up to 100A, enabling fast and efficient battery charging. The intuitive LCD display provides real-time monitoring, showing crucial system metrics such as input and output voltage, battery level, and system status. This allows users to configure and optimize settings based on their specific energy requirements. Compatible with both lithium-ion and lead-acid batteries, this hybrid inverter offers flexibility for users to design a system that best meets their energy needs. Compact and lightweight, it is designed for easy installation and integration into existing solar energy setups or backup power systems. Whether the goal is to reduce electricity costs, achieve energy independence, or enhance sustainability, the FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER is a dependable and innovative choice.

Name: Hikvision UPS DS-UPS3000
Column1:
The Hikvision UPS DS-UPS3000 is a reliable and efficient uninterruptible power supply (UPS) designed to provide backup power and protect sensitive equipment from power fluctuations. It is ideal for both residential and commercial applications, ensuring uninterrupted operation of critical devices.
Specifications
  • Capacity: 3000 VA / 1800 W.
  • Input Voltage Range: 140 VAC to 290 VAC.
  • Output Voltage Range: 210 VAC to 235 VAC.
  • Output Frequency: 50/60 Hz ± 0.5 Hz (self-adaptive).
  • Transfer Time: ≤ 10 ms.
  • Waveform: PWM (Pulse Width Modulation).
  • Battery: 12 V/9 Ah × 4 lead-acid batteries.
  • Recharge Time: 6-8 hours to recover 90% capacity.
  • Backup Time:
    • 100W load: 150 minutes.
    • 600W load: 15 minutes.
    • 900W load: 6 minutes.
  • Protection: Surge protection, overload protection, discharge protection, and short circuit protection.
  • Interface: USB port for remote control.
  • Display: LCD screen showing input voltage, output voltage, battery capacity, and load level.
  • Operating Temperature: 0°C to 40°C (32°F to 104°F).
  • Dimensions: 412 mm × 145 mm × 210 mm (16.22" × 5.71" × 8.27").
  • Weight: Approximately 18.5 kg (40.8 lbs).
WHY Hikvision UPS DS-UPS3000? The Hikvision UPS DS-UPS3000 is an excellent choice for ensuring uninterrupted power supply and protecting your devices from power surges and fluctuations. With a capacity of 3000 VA / 1800 W, it can handle a variety of devices, making it suitable for both home and office use. Its fast transfer time of ≤ 10 ms ensures minimal disruption during power outages, while the built-in surge and overload protection safeguards your equipment.

Name: Epson TM-T20III Printer
Column1:
The Epson TM-T20III printer is an affordable and reliable thermal receipt printer designed for small businesses and retail environments. With a print speed of up to 250 mm/sec, it ensures fast and efficient receipt printing. The Epson TM-T20III printer supports 80mm paper width and features an Automatic Paper Reduction function, minimizing paper usage and reducing costs. Its compact design and USB, Serial, or Ethernet connectivity options make it versatile and easy to integrate into various POS systems. Built for durability, the TM-T20III offers a mechanism life of 15 million lines and an auto-cutter life of 1.5 million cuts. Specifications
  • Printing Technology: Thermal line printing
  • Print Speed: Up to 250 mm/sec
  • Resolution: 203 x 203 dpi
  • Connectivity: USB, Serial, Ethernet
  • Paper Handling: 80mm paper width, Automatic Paper Reduction
  • Durability: Mechanism life of 15 million lines, Auto-cutter life of 1.5 million cuts
  • Eco-Friendly: Reduces paper usage by up to 30%
WHY Epson TM-T20III Printer? The Epson TM-T20III Printer is perfect for businesses seeking a cost-effective and reliable receipt printer. Its fast print speed and durable design ensure efficiency in high-volume environments. The USB and RS232 connectivity options make it versatile and easy to integrate into existing systems. With its eco-friendly paper-saving features, the TM-T20III is a smart choice for businesses looking to reduce costs and environmental impact

Name: Epson Dot Matrix Printer LQ-2190

The Epson Dot Matrix Printer LQ-2190 is a high-performance, wide-carriage printer designed for demanding business environments. With its 24-pin impact dot matrix technology, it delivers sharp and reliable prints, making it ideal for invoices, delivery notes, and multi-part forms. The Epson Dot Matrix Printer LQ-2190 offers a print speed of up to 576 characters per second (cps) and supports 6-part forms (1 original + 5 copies). Its robust design ensures durability, with a mean time between failures (MTBF) of 20,000 power-on hours. Featuring USB, Parallel, and optional Ethernet connectivity, the LQ-2190 integrates seamlessly into various setups. Specifications
  • Printing Technology: 24-pin impact dot matrix
  • Print Speed: Up to 576 cps (High-Speed Draft)
  • Resolution: Up to 360 x 180 dpi
  • Connectivity: USB 2.0, Parallel, optional Ethernet
  • Paper Handling: Supports single sheets, continuous paper, labels, and multi-part forms
  • Durability: MTBF of 20,000 power-on hours
  • Ribbon Life: Approximately 15 million characters
  • Dimensions: 639 x 402 x 256 mm
  • Weight: 13 kg
WHY Epson Dot Matrix Printer LQ-2190? The Epson LQ-2190 is perfect for businesses requiring a reliable and cost-effective printer for high-volume tasks. Its ability to handle multi-part forms and continuous paper makes it ideal for logistics, banking, and industrial applications. With high-speed performance, versatile connectivity, and a robust design, it ensures consistent and high-quality printing, making it a valuable addition to any business setup.

Name: Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5
Column1:
The Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5 is a compact and versatile outdoor wireless bridge/base station designed for high-performance connectivity. Operating on the 5 GHz frequency band, it delivers reliable point-to-point and point-to-multipoint wireless communication with a real outdoor throughput of over 150 Mbps and a range of up to 15+ km. The NSM5 features a 16 dBi dual-polarity antenna with optimized cross-polarity isolation, ensuring efficient and stable data transmission. It utilizes Ubiquiti's airMAX technology, which employs a Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA) protocol to enhance network performance by reducing latency and improving scalability. Name: CAT6 NETWORK CABLE
Column1:
A Cat6 network cable is a standardized twisted-pair cable used for Ethernet and other network applications. It offers higher performance than Cat 5e cables, supporting speeds of up to 10 Gbps at a frequency of 250 MHz.

Key Features of Cat 6 Cable
  • Speed: Supports 10 Gbps over distances up to 55 meters; for longer distances, speeds may be lower.
  • Bandwidth: Operates at 250 MHz, reducing interference and improving data transmission.
  • Backward Compatibility: Works with Cat 5e and Cat 3 standards.
  • Shielding: Available in shielded (STP) and unshielded (UTP) versions to minimize crosstalk.
  • Connectors: Typically terminated with RJ45 connectors, using either T568A or T568B wiring standards.
  • Use Cases: Ideal for home networks, office setups, and data centers requiring reliable high-speed connections.
Categories: Tech Accessories, Tech Accessories > Power Solutions

A 3-IN-1 CABLE combines three connector types—typically USB-C, Lightning, and Micro-USB—into one convenient cable. It’s designed for charging multiple devices with different ports using a single cable, making it ideal for travel, retail bundles, or everyday use in homes and offices.
  • Connectors: USB-A to USB-C, Lightning, and Micro-USB
  • Cable Length: 1 meter (some models offer 1.2m or longer)
  • Output: Up to 5V/3A or 20W (depending on model)
  • Data Transfer Speed: Up to 480Mbps (for supported connectors)
  • Build: Braided or TPE outer layer for durability
  • Bend Lifespan: Tested for 5,000–10,000+ bends
  • Compatibility:
    • USB-C: Android phones, tablets, newer accessories
    • Lightning: iPhones, iPads, AirPods
    • Micro-USB: Older Android devices, Bluetooth speakers, power banks

    • Quick Charge support (on compatible ports)
